final:
module sram_cell (
    input wire [7:0] data_in,
    input wire we,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);
    reg [7:0] memory;

    always @(*) begin
        if (we) begin
            memory <= data_in; // Write operation
        end else begin
            data_out <= memory; // Read operation
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      memory <= ~data_in;
      if (!we) begin
      data_out <= ~memory;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
